title: Mythral CPVP
description: A pack with the theme of purple and blue made for crystal PVP and has multiple features; Small totem pop, low fire, no explosion particles and Much more
body:
Slate Blue Crystal PvP Pack [1.20+]
Built for serious Crystal PvP players, this pack delivers a clean slate blue aesthetic with custom textures designed for precision, clarity, and smooth gameplay.

Features:

Low Fire – stay locked in without visual clutter

Small Totem Pop Particles – less flash, more focus

Custom End Crystal & Obsidian Textures – sharp, clean, and easy to see for perfect placements

CPvP Essentials – optimized textures for anchor fights, breaking, placing, and fast crystal combos

Slate Blue Theme – icy visuals that look great without hurting performance

Perfect for 1.20+ crystal mains who want crisp visuals and no distractions. Stay cold, hit fast, and pop harder.
